args.code:
import json

# Load the result from the previous step
with open(locals()['var_function-call-16367055759489104877'], 'r') as f:

print(f"First 5 stocks: {stocks[:5]}")
print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps(len(stocks)))

t_file = locals()['var_function-call-10823379769543872171']

with open(s_file, 'r') as f:
    stocks = json.load(f)

with open(t_file, 'r') as f:
    tables = set(json.load(f))

valid_stocks = []
descriptions = {}
for s in stocks:
    sym = s['Symbol']
    if sym in tables:
        valid_stocks.append(sym)
        descriptions[sym] = s['Company Description']

queries = []
for sym in valid_stocks:
    # Build query parts

    queries.append(q)

full_query = " UNION ALL ".join(queries)

print("__RESULT__:")
print(json.dumps({"query": full_query, "descriptions": descriptions}))

    queries.append(q)

print('__RESULT__:')

args.code:
import json

# Load from previous step
with open(locals()['var_function-call-11987320632037346715'], 'r') as f:
    data = json.load(f)

full_query = data['query']
# The full_query is a single string joined by UNION ALL.
# I want to split it back or regenerate it.
# Easier to regenerate or split by " UNION ALL ".

queries = full_query.split(" UNION ALL ")

batch_size = 40
batches = []
for i in range(0, len(queries), batch_size):
    batch = queries[i:i+batch_size]
    batches.append(" UNION ALL ".join(batch))

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(batches))

import json

stocks = ["AEFC", "AIN", "AIV", "AIZP", "AJRD", "AL", "AMN", "AMP", "AMT", "ARD", "ARGD", "ARLO", "ASG", "AVA", "BANC", "BBU", "BBVA", "BDXA", "BKH", "BKT", "BLD", "BNS", "BV", "BZH", "CADE", "CAE", "CAF", "CBT", "CCC", "CCZ", "CHAP", "CIA", "CMA", "CMI", "CMSA", "CNK", "COTY", "CRC", "CRM", "CRS", "CSL", "CTS", "CUBE", "CURO", "CVIA", "CVX", "CXH", "DAC", "DDS", "DDT", "DEO", "DGX", "DMB", "DTQ", "DXC", "EARN", "EBS", "EGO", "EGY", "EIG"]

queries = []
q_quote = chr(39)
d_quote = chr(34)

for sym in stocks:
    q = "SELECT " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " as Symbol, " + \
        "SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, " + \
        "SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays " + \
        "FROM " + d_quote + sym + d_quote + " " + \
        "WHERE Date >= " + q_quote + "2017-01-01" + q_quote + " AND Date <= " + q_quote + "2017-12-31" + q_quote
    queries.append(q)

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(" UNION ALL ".join(queries)))

stocks = ["AEFC", "AIN", "AIV", "AIZP", "AJRD", "AL", "AMN", "AMP", "AMT", "ARD", "ARGD", "ARLO", "ASG", "AVA", "BANC", "BBU", "BBVA", "BDXA", "BKH", "BKT", "BLD", "BNS", "BV", "BZH", "CADE", "CAE", "CAF", "CBT", "CCC", "CCZ", "CHAP", "CIA", "CMA", "CMI", "CMSA", "CNK", "COTY", "CRC", "CRM", "CRS", "CSL", "CTS", "CUBE", "CURO", "CVIA", "CVX", "CXH", "DAC", "DDS", "DDT", "DEO", "DGX", "DMB", "DTQ", "DXC", "EARN", "EBS", "EGO", "EGY", "EIG", "ELF", "EMP", "ENLC", "EPR", "EPRT", "ES", "ESRT", "ESS", "ETM", "EV", "EVT", "EXP", "FMN", "FPAC", "FSM", "GCO", "GD", "GDL", "GDV", "GEL", "GJP", "GLOB", "GLT", "GOL", "GSLD", "GTY", "GVA", "GWB", "H", "HBI", "HDB", "HEP", "HIL", "HIO", "HIX", "HLF", "HLT", "HNI", "HRB", "HTFA", "IBM", "IGR", "IHC", "IPG", "IRM", "IT", "JGH", "JHY", "JKS", "JMP", "JNPR", "KMB", "KNX", "KW", "KYN", "LB", "LDOS", "LHC", "LHX", "LOMA", "MANU", "MDLX", "MDLY", "MED", "MFO", "MGR", "MGU", "MHE", "MIY", "MKC", "MLI", "MNE", "MR", "MS", "MTD", "MYD", "NFH", "NGG", "NJV", "NNI", "NNY", "NRUC", "NUE", "NXN", "OCFT", "OEC", "ORA", "ORAN", "ORCL", "ORN", "PAG", "PBI", "PFE", "PFSI", "PGR", "PIM", "PKE", "PLAN", "PLNT", "PMT", "PNM", "PPG", "PRSP", "PRTY", "PSV", "PSXP", "QTS", "QUAD", "RBC", "RCB", "RCI", "RES", "REXR", "RH", "RMT", "ROG", "ROL", "RPAI", "RPM", "RQI", "RWT", "SAF", "SAIL", "SAM", "SBR", "SCU", "SFUN", "SHAK", "SI", "SITC", "SJM", "SJT", "SJW", "SLF", "SMP", "SOL", "SPOT", "SRC", "SRF", "SRT", "SSD", "STG", "STL", "STON", "SYX", "TBB", "TCP", "TDJ", "TGP", "TLYS", "TNC", "TPH", "TRV", "TTI", "TUFN", "TWTR", "UHT", "UIS", "USX", "UTL", "VET", "VGR", "VHI", "VIV", "VKQ", "VRT", "VVI", "WOR", "WPG", "WSM", "X", "YEXT", "ZNH", "ZTR"]

batch = stocks[0:40]
queries = []
q_quote = chr(39)
d_quote = chr(34)

for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " as Symbol, " + \
        "SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, " + \
        "SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays " + \
        "FROM " + d_quote + sym + d_quote + " " + \
        "WHERE Date >= " + q_quote + "2017-01-01" + q_quote + " AND Date <= " + q_quote + "2017-12-31" + q_quote
    queries.append(q)

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(" UNION ALL ".join(queries)))

import json

stocks = ["AEFC", "AIN", "AIV", "AIZP", "AJRD", "AL", "AMN", "AMP", "AMT", "ARD", "ARGD", "ARLO", "ASG", "AVA", "BANC", "BBU", "BBVA", "BDXA", "BKH", "BKT", "BLD", "BNS", "BV", "BZH", "CADE", "CAE", "CAF", "CBT", "CCC", "CCZ", "CHAP", "CIA", "CMA", "CMI", "CMSA", "CNK", "COTY", "CRC", "CRM", "CRS", "CSL", "CTS", "CUBE", "CURO", "CVIA", "CVX", "CXH", "DAC", "DDS", "DDT", "DEO", "DGX", "DMB", "DTQ", "DXC", "EARN", "EBS", "EGO", "EGY", "EIG", "ELF", "EMP", "ENLC", "EPR", "EPRT", "ES", "ESRT", "ESS", "ETM", "EV", "EVT", "EXP", "FMN", "FPAC", "FSM", "GCO", "GD", "GDL", "GDV", "GEL", "GJP", "GLOB", "GLT", "GOL", "GSLD", "GTY", "GVA", "GWB", "H", "HBI", "HDB", "HEP", "HIL", "HIO", "HIX", "HLF", "HLT", "HNI", "HRB", "HTFA", "IBM", "IGR", "IHC", "IPG", "IRM", "IT", "JGH", "JHY", "JKS", "JMP", "JNPR", "KMB", "KNX", "KW", "KYN", "LB", "LDOS", "LHC", "LHX", "LOMA", "MANU", "MDLX", "MDLY", "MED", "MFO", "MGR", "MGU", "MHE", "MIY", "MKC", "MLI", "MNE", "MR", "MS", "MTD", "MYD", "NFH", "NGG", "NJV", "NNI", "NNY", "NRUC", "NUE", "NXN", "OCFT", "OEC", "ORA", "ORAN", "ORCL", "ORN", "PAG", "PBI", "PFE", "PFSI", "PGR", "PIM", "PKE", "PLAN", "PLNT", "PMT", "PNM", "PPG", "PRSP", "PRTY", "PSV", "PSXP", "QTS", "QUAD", "RBC", "RCB", "RCI", "RES", "REXR", "RH", "RMT", "ROG", "ROL", "RPAI", "RPM", "RQI", "RWT", "SAF", "SAIL", "SAM", "SBR", "SCU", "SFUN", "SHAK", "SI", "SITC", "SJM", "SJT", "SJW", "SLF", "SMP", "SOL", "SPOT", "SRC", "SRF", "SRT", "SSD", "STG", "STL", "STON", "SYX", "TBB", "TCP", "TDJ", "TGP", "TLYS", "TNC", "TPH", "TRV", "TTI", "TUFN", "TWTR", "UHT", "UIS", "USX", "UTL", "VET", "VGR", "VHI", "VIV", "VKQ", "VRT", "VVI", "WOR", "WPG", "WSM", "X", "YEXT", "ZNH", "ZTR"]

batch = stocks[40:80]
queries = []
q_quote = chr(39)
d_quote = chr(34)

for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " as Symbol, " + \
        "SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, " + \
        "SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays " + \
        "FROM " + d_quote + sym + d_quote + " " + \
        "WHERE Date >= " + q_quote + "2017-01-01" + q_quote + " AND Date <= " + q_quote + "2017-12-31" + q_quote
    queries.append(q)

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(" UNION ALL ".join(queries)))

batch = stocks[40:80]
queries = []
q_quote = chr(39)
d_quote = chr(34)

for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " as Symbol, " + \
        "SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, " + \
        "SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays " + \
        "FROM " + d_quote + sym + d_quote + " " + \
        "WHERE Date >= " + q_quote + "2017-01-01" + q_quote + " AND Date <= " + q_quote + "2017-12-31" + q_quote
    queries.append(q)

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(" UNION ALL ".join(queries)))

stocks = ["AEFC", "AIN", "AIV", "AIZP", "AJRD", "AL", "AMN", "AMP", "AMT", "ARD", "ARGD", "ARLO", "ASG", "AVA", "BANC", "BBU", "BBVA", "BDXA", "BKH", "BKT", "BLD", "BNS", "BV", "BZH", "CADE", "CAE", "CAF", "CBT", "CCC", "CCZ", "CHAP", "CIA", "CMA", "CMI", "CMSA", "CNK", "COTY", "CRC", "CRM", "CRS", "CSL", "CTS", "CUBE", "CURO", "CVIA", "CVX", "CXH", "DAC", "DDS", "DDT", "DEO", "DGX", "DMB", "DTQ", "DXC", "EARN", "EBS", "EGO", "EGY", "EIG", "ELF", "EMP", "ENLC", "EPR", "EPRT", "ES", "ESRT", "ESS", "ETM", "EV", "EVT", "EXP", "FMN", "FPAC", "FSM", "GCO", "GD", "GDL", "GDV", "GEL", "GJP", "GLOB", "GLT", "GOL", "GSLD", "GTY", "GVA", "GWB", "H", "HBI", "HDB", "HEP", "HIL", "HIO", "HIX", "HLF", "HLT", "HNI", "HRB", "HTFA", "IBM", "IGR", "IHC", "IPG", "IRM", "IT", "JGH", "JHY", "JKS", "JMP", "JNPR", "KMB", "KNX", "KW", "KYN", "LB", "LDOS", "LHC", "LHX", "LOMA", "MANU", "MDLX", "MDLY", "MED", "MFO", "MGR", "MGU", "MHE", "MIY", "MKC", "MLI", "MNE", "MR", "MS", "MTD", "MYD", "NFH", "NGG", "NJV", "NNI", "NNY", "NRUC", "NUE", "NXN", "OCFT", "OEC", "ORA", "ORAN", "ORCL", "ORN", "PAG", "PBI", "PFE", "PFSI", "PGR", "PIM", "PKE", "PLAN", "PLNT", "PMT", "PNM", "PPG", "PRSP", "PRTY", "PSV", "PSXP", "QTS", "QUAD", "RBC", "RCB", "RCI", "RES", "REXR", "RH", "RMT", "ROG", "ROL", "RPAI", "RPM", "RQI", "RWT", "SAF", "SAIL", "SAM", "SBR", "SCU", "SFUN", "SHAK", "SI", "SITC", "SJM", "SJT", "SJW", "SLF", "SMP", "SOL", "SPOT", "SRC", "SRF", "SRT", "SSD", "STG", "STL", "STON", "SYX", "TBB", "TCP", "TDJ", "TGP", "TLYS", "TNC", "TPH", "TRV", "TTI", "TUFN", "TWTR", "UHT", "UIS", "USX", "UTL", "VET", "VGR", "VHI", "VIV", "VKQ", "VRT", "VVI", "WOR", "WPG", "WSM", "X", "YEXT", "ZNH", "ZTR"]

batch = stocks[80:120]
queries = []
q_quote = chr(39)
d_quote = chr(34)

for sym in batch:
    q = "SELECT " + q_quote + sym + q_quote + " as Symbol, " + \
        "SUM(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as UpDays, " + \
        "SUM(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as DownDays " + \
        "FROM " + d_quote + sym + d_quote + " " + \
        "WHERE Date >= " + q_quote + "2017-01-01" + q_quote + " AND Date <= " + q_quote + "2017-12-31" + q_quote
    queries.append(q)

print('__RESULT__:')
print(json.dumps(" UNION ALL ".join(queries)))
